rulings.Case Title: CARLMA S, HOUWELING VS. LORA NIKA DAHLBACKA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Lora Nika Dahlbacka Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment And Award Of Attorneys? Fees Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 23, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT LORA DAHLBACKA'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment And Award Of Attorneys, Fees Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 is DENIED. Defendant was entitled to dismissal only if she complied with the terms of the agreement. Defendant admittedly did not comply with the terms. While the Court did not find that this non-compliance constituted material breach warranting an entry of judgment, the condition for dismissal was compliance, not a Court finding of breach. However, there is no reason for this action to remain active. The complaince period of the stipulation that may be enforced in this action has ended. Unless Plaintiff plans on filing a motion to enforce a stipulation based on pre-August 1, 2020 non-compliance, Plaintiff shall dismiss this action. Any post-August 1, 2020 violation of the Agreement per paragraph 6B shall be the subject of a separate action, not this unlawful detainer. Plaintiff to address at the hearing any potential filing of a motion to enforce for pre-August 1, 2020 breach; and statute of limitations on such enforcement and the Court will set an OSC: re dismissal. Requests for attorney's fees are denied. = (501/CFH)
